title: Create: Netherless Ported
description: Create: Netherless to 1.21.1 NeoForge, de-mcreatored it, make recipes better, and add new features!
body:
# Create: Netherless Ported
Create: Netherless to 1.21.1 NeoForge, de-mcreatored it, made recipes better, and added new features!

**Visit the original mod here: [Create: Netherless](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-netherless)**
## Why this port?
The original mod wasn't updated for Minecraft 1.21.1 and for Create 6. It was also built with MCreator, which results in a lot of issues. Therefore, I went ahead and ported it to fix various issues and to expand the concept of it.

## Why was this mod made?
I wanted to have Create: Netherless on 1.21.1, but it was not on that version yet for Create 6.
The mod was originally made with MCreator, so that came with a ton of issues. Therefore, I ported it. 

## The new things:
- Sand to Soul sand conversion
- Ectoplasm that has a use and can be obtained
  - 25% chance of killing a phantom
    - Note: Looting enchantment does not apply to ectoplasm drops
- Recipe fixes
  - The original mod had broken recipes

And more!
